description: Paperspace is a cloud compute platform for GPU machines, notebooks, model deployments, and related infrastructure. The service is now part of DigitalOcean, and its older Core and Gradient developer tooling is documented as deprecated.
summary: Paperspace exposes a REST API at `https://api.paperspace.com/v1` plus two legacy/deprecated CLIs (`paperspace` and `gradient`), all authenticated with a team-scoped Paperspace API key.
